refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy, control algorithm effectiveness, and optimization results against the target energy_per_ton metric.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms for energy-efficient operation.
DP3: Use data analytics and feedback loops for operational optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between measurement and control modules
Feedback loops between optimization and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is foundational and logically decoupled from control and optimization DPs, enabling modular implementation.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor calibration and reliable telemetry link.
Risk of data latency affecting real-time control decisions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit DPs for control and optimization in subsequent decomposition levels.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical sensors and embedded telemetry hardware installed on the vehicle platform.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends energy consumption and tonnage data to NGHE Solution for analysis and control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data transmission between Vehicle and central NGHE Solution modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Central processing but no direct sensor hardware containment.
Physical sensors and telemetry hardware are fully contained here.
Minimal involvement; mostly control commands, not measurement.
No containment or diffusion related to energy measurement.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy measurement hardware and telemetry logically belong within the Vehicle module to minimize interface complexity and maximize data integrity.
containment_risks: Potential hardware-software integration challenges within Vehicle module.
Dependency on reliable network link for telemetry data transmission.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Validate sensor integration and telemetry reliability during detailed design.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (energy and load sensors with telemetry) directly satisfies the refined FR1 for measurement, with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry data diffusion across modules may cause latency or synchronization issues.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Assigning measurement DP to Vehicle module aligns physical hardware with ownership boundaries, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via sensor calibration tests and telemetry data validation within the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of measurement function to Vehicle module reduces ambiguity.

recommended_revisions: Further decompose control and optimization FRs and select corresponding DPs and IMs.
Assess telemetry network reliability and latency impacts.

decision.justification: The measurement FR and DP are well defined and assigned, but the overall energy efficiency FR requires further decomposition into control and optimization sub-FRs to fully address the requirement.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

revise.why: To decompose the high-level energy efficiency FR into atomic sub-FRs enabling targeted DP and IM selections.

assumptions: Sensor data is accurate and timely.
evidence_needed: Sensor calibration and accuracy test results.
